entries.title: Fighter Class
entries.content: Fighter-class ships are the backbone of any combat fleet. Fast and agile, they sacrifice cargo space for raw firepower and maneuverability. Ideal for bounty hunters and combat pilots.

entries.title: Freighter Class
entries.content: Freighters are the lifeblood of interstellar commerce. Their massive cargo holds make them indispensable for trade routes, though their sluggish speed makes them easy targets without an escort.

entries.title: Explorer Class
entries.content: Explorer-class vessels are built for the unknown. Equipped with advanced sensor arrays and extended fuel tanks, they can venture further into uncharted space than any other ship class.

entries.title: Nebula Corporation
entries.content: Founded in 2387, Nebula Corporation grew from a small mining operation into the galaxy's most powerful megacorporation. They control over 40% of all industrial output in the known systems.

entries.title: Astra Confederation
entries.content: The Astra Confederation was formed after the Galactic Wars to maintain peace and order. Their military might is unmatched, but critics argue their laws restrict free trade and individual liberty.

entries.title: Free Traders Guild
entries.content: The Free Traders Guild is less an organization and more a philosophy. United by a shared belief in freedom of movement and commerce, guild members help each other survive in the lawless frontier.

entries.title: Minerals
entries.content: Raw ore and refined metals form the foundation of the galactic economy. Mining colonies produce them in bulk, while industrial worlds consume them voraciously.

entries.title: Technology
entries.content: Advanced tech components are the most valuable legal commodity in the galaxy. Research stations produce them, and military and corporate buyers pay top credit.

entries.title: Luxury Goods
entries.content: From rare spices to exotic art, luxury goods command extraordinary prices in wealthy systems. Smuggling them through restricted zones can triple your profit — if you don't get caught.

entries.title: The Galactic Wars
entries.content: The Galactic Wars (2340-2380) were a series of devastating conflicts that reshaped the known universe. Fought over resources and political dominance, they left entire systems uninhabitable and gave rise to the current faction structure.

entries.title: Warp Drive Technology
entries.content: Warp drives were invented in 2301 by Dr. Elara Voss, revolutionizing interstellar travel. Modern warp cores can traverse a light-year in minutes, though the fuel cost remains prohibitive for smaller vessels.
